1_home_dashboard.description: Full-screen map view. Floating action button for centering location. Small bottom sheet at 25% height showing 'Offline' / 'Online' toggle switch, today's earnings ($0.00), and quick stats.
1_home_dashboard.animations: Bottom sheet uses spring animation on toggle.

2_incoming_order.description: High-priority modal or 60% bottom sheet overlay. Shows route map preview on the top half. Content: Estimated payout (huge text, $12.50), Pickup name, Dropoff distance (2.4 mi), ETA (15 min). Two massive buttons: Accept (Primary) and Reject (Subtle/Ghost).
2_incoming_order.animations: Sheet springs up aggressively. Map camera animates to fit route bounds with padding.

3_navigation_to_pickup.description: Live navigation view. Map is angled/tilted for 3D feel. Bottom sheet at 20% showing next turn instruction. Floating pill at top showing ETA to pickup. 'Arrived at Pickup' button appears when within radius.
3_navigation_to_pickup.animations: Smooth camera tracking. Bottom sheet gracefully shrinks from step 2.

4_arrived_at_pickup.description: Bottom sheet expands to 40%. Shows restaurant name, address, and an 'Arrived' button.

5_confirm_pickup.description: Expands to 75% or full screen. Detailed list of order items, order number (#A94B), customer notes ('Please knock'). Swipe-to-confirm slider at the bottom.

6_navigation_to_customer.description: Similar to step 3, but route is from pickup to dropoff. ETA updates.
6_navigation_to_customer.animations: Map camera animates out, then zooms into new route.

7_arrived_at_dropoff.description: Bottom sheet expands to 40%. Shows customer address, apartment number, gate code.

8_confirm_delivery.description: Optional photo capture placeholder area. Swipe-to-complete slider 'Swipe to Complete Delivery'.
8_confirm_delivery.animations: Swipe action triggers success haptic and transitions screen.

9_earnings_summary.description: Celebratory overlay sheet. Big bold typography showing amount earned ('+ $12.50'). 'Done' button to return to home.
9_earnings_summary.animations: Slide up with slight bounce. Numbers counter animation from 0 to total.

10_rating_feedback.description: Thumbs up / Thumbs down quick rating for the dropoff experience. Can be integrated into the earnings summary sheet.

11_delivery_history.description: Separate screen accessed from a drawer or profile icon. List of past deliveries in cards (Date, Amount, Locations).
11_delivery_history.animations: List items slide up and fade in.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use strictly React Native Expo with react-native-reanimated and @gorhom/bottom-sheet for all slide-up panels.
Use lucide-react-native for all icons (e.g., MapPin, Navigation, CheckCircle, Package). Do not use web-only libraries.
Ensure the map (react-native-maps) is set to full screen ('absoluteFillObject') and UI elements float above it using absolute positioning or bottom sheets.
Use Outfit font if available via @expo-google-fonts/outfit. If not, default to standard system geometric font with tight letter spacing.
Do NOT use raw text elements directly; create a standardized Typography component based on the sizes provided in this guideline.
All interactive elements MUST include testID matching data-testid conventions for robust automated testing (e.g., testID='accept-order-button').
Build the 11-step flow iteratively, using a central state machine or React Context to drive the active step.
Ensure the OpenStreetMap tile uses a minimal style URL without an API key, fitting a modern, uncluttered look.
